Findings.Title: Defender Secure Score: 42 / 60 (70%)
Findings.Detail: Secure Score for subscription 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111. Current=42, Max=60, Percentage=70%.

Findings.Title: MFA should be enabled on accounts with owner permissions on your subscription
Findings.Detail: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) should be enabled for all subscription accounts with owner permissions to prevent a breach.
Findings.Remediation: Enable MFA for all owner accounts via Conditional Access or Security Defaults.

Findings.Title: Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled
Findings.Detail: Require secure transfer (HTTPS) on storage accounts to avoid man-in-the-middle attacks.
Findings.Remediation: Set supportsHttpsTrafficOnly = true on the storage account.
